ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  "primary_care_physician" TEXT /* Name of the patient's primary care physician */,
  "date_of_registration" TEXT /* Date when the patient was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of vital signs */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient to whom the records belong */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vital signs were recorded */,
  "SpO2" REAL /* Oxygen saturation level */,
  "RESP" REAL /* Respiratory rate */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Heart rate */,
  "ABP1" REAL /* Reading of arterial blood pressure 1 */,
  "ABP2" REAL /* Reading of arterial blood pressure 2 */,
  "ABP3" REAL /* Reading of arterial blood pressure 3 */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Body temperature */,
  "blood_glucose" REAL /* Blood glucose level */,
  "oxygen_therapy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is receiving oxygen therapy */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used to record the vital signs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vital signs were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, doctor) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the staff member */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Professional license number */,
  "date_of_employment" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was employed */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being monitored */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member conducting the monitoring */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the monitoring session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the monitoring session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of monitoring session (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the monitoring session */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used during the monitoring session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the monitoring session took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sessions_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vital sign record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert generated (e.g., critical SpO2 level) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  "responsible_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member responsible for handling the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vital_signs ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_responsible_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access to the patient data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the patient data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
